description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular form with a dark, weathered wood finish and a speckled, stone-like top surface. The front side includes three horizontal drawers with subtle, integrated handles and an open shelf above them, as well as a single vertical cabinet door on the right. The wood exterior shows signs of wear, scratches, and discoloration, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. The legs are short and squared, providing stable support while keeping the piece slightly elevated from the ground. The side and back panels are plain, with the same distressed wood texture throughout. This utilitarian design is suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, such as garages, porches, or entryways.
description: A rustic, weathered wood nightstand with three drawers, an open shelf, and a single cabinet door, topped with a speckled stone-like surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with integrated handles, an open shelf, and a right-side cabinet door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, distressed wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wood panel with visible wear and discoloration.
description_view_3: Right side view showing another plain, weathered wood panel, similar to the left side.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside other furniture
